summary: Iteration 3 — budget modal + portrait multi-page PDF + email attachments fully tested. Backend: 10/10 new pytest cases pass (budget persistence, PDF portrait/multi-page, 'YOUR ORGANIZED SPACE' photos page, shopping total ≤ budget cap, Plus admin+customer emails carry 1 PDF + 3 PNGs, Free emails carry PNGs only, regression on plans/checkout/free-402/missing-404). Frontend: budget modal opens after upload-submit-btn click, shows the required heading, renders all 6 budget options with $100–$300 default highlighted emerald, supports switching, cancel returns to upload with no POST, confirm fires POST /api/submissions with the chosen budget label ('$500 – $1,000' verified) and navigates onward. All success criteria of the review_request are met.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 408: 'paid plan verification is currently bypassed' — previous iteration's paid-session enforcement (and the now-stale test_paid_plan_rejected_with_unpaid_session in test_flowspace_api.py) is intentionally disabled. Stripe checkout endpoints still exist but submissions accept any plan without a paid session. This is by design per the latest changes but is a regression vs. iteration 2 tests; consider deleting the two obsolete 402-expectation tests in test_flowspace_api.py or documenting the bypass.

design_plan.py _merge_plan clamps shopping totals to the budget cap proportionally — works correctly, but if the AI returns shopping where price floors to 5 the clamp can over-shrink items. Acceptable for current ranges.
pdf_generator.py _render_photos_page uses inline 'visibility:hidden' filler when only one extra photo — fine for layout but adds a meaningless empty block; could simply not flex-grow.
BudgetModal.jsx: ESC key handler closes modal but does not reset selection on reopen — minor UX nit (state persists if user reopens). Not blocking.
send_admin_email_sync/send_customer_email_sync still log errors silently when Resend fails. Acceptable for non-blocking BackgroundTasks but no retry.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Submissions inserted via API with TEST_iter3_*@example.com emails. No direct Mongo seeding needed in iter3 (paid-session bypass means Plus accepts submissions directly).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter3 added /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_budget_pdf_email.py. Note iteration 2's test_paid_plan_rejected_without_session / test_paid_plan_rejected_with_unpaid_session in test_flowspace_api.py are now STALE because the server intentionally bypasses paid-session enforcement (server.py ~line 408). PDF is verified end-to-end with PyMuPDF (fitz) — portrait Letter (612x792pt), ≥2 pages, contains 'YOUR ORGANIZED SPACE' heading, and shopping total clamped ≤ budget upper bound. Email attachments asserted by monkey-patching server.resend.Emails.send.
